summary: Frontend testing of mobile-first field worker activity logging app. All 15 features tested on 390x844 viewport. App uses localStorage (no backend). Core flows are working with two notable issues: PDF viewer renders blank and bottom nav clicks are blocked by 'Made with Emergent' overlay badge.

ui_bugs.issue: PDF preview area renders blank (empty gray area) when modal opens. @react-pdf/renderer PDFViewer shows no content. Download button exists but PDF may not render correctly.

'Made with Emergent' badge overlay intercepts clicks on bottom nav buttons (nav-pengaturan, nav-kegiatan). Requires JS click or force=True to navigate. Real users may be affected if badge overlaps nav area at 390px viewport.

issues: Time inputs display in 12h format (07:30 A, 05:00 P) instead of 24h - browser-dependent behavior, not a code bug

action_items: Investigate blank PDF preview issue in PDFViewer - check if @react-pdf/renderer PDFViewer works in this browser environment, consider fallback or alternative
Check if 'Made with Emergent' badge z-index overlaps the bottom navigation bar at 390px mobile viewport width - may need to adjust badge positioning or nav z-index
critical_code_review_comments: PDFViewer from @react-pdf/renderer may not work in all browsers/environments - should test in Chrome specifically. Consider using blob URL approach instead of PDFViewer iframe.
KegiatanPage.jsx line 37: `freshSettings = loadSettings()` on every render is fine for pure client app but could cause performance issues at scale.
DayCard expand state is not collapsed after save - user sees the editing form still open after confirming save. This may be intentional but UX could be improved.
seed_data_creation: None - localStorage app, data cleared between tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 features tested. Features 1-10, 12-15 PASS. Feature 11 (PDF preview content) needs investigation - modal opens but PDFViewer content is blank. Bottom nav requires JS click due to 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay. Test credentials: fill Pengaturan with ZAINUDIN / 199703162025061003 / Operator Alat Berat...
